signals.headline: XRP Flips BNB to #4 Crypto | YES | MED**
signals.raw:
XRP Flips BNB to #4 Crypto | YES | MED**  
XRP reached $91B market cap, surpassing BNB for 4th place and narrowing the gap to Ethereum ($280B) at ~$2.50 per XRP target per analysts like Standard Chartered ($2.80).[1]  
Speculation on catching Ethereum ties to CLARITY Act progress and Mastercard integration, fueling market bets despite no immediate resolution.[1][2]
